ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - NVIDIA Tool
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
RimSynapse - NVIDIA Tool Official Wiki and Documentation: https://github.com/RimSynapse/NVIDIA-Tool/wiki
Real-Time GPU Monitoring and LLM Performance Dashboard for RimSynapse.
This developer and power-user tool provides a comprehensive overview of your local GPU's health, VRAM usage, and LLM request performance — all rendered directly inside RimWorld's UI.
--- Core Systems --- - Live GPU Monitoring: Reads NVIDIA GPU stats via nvidia-smi in real-time. Displays VRAM usage, GPU temperature, utilization percentage, and power draw. - VRAM Breakdown: Shows a detailed breakdown of estimated VRAM consumption: model size, KV cache, context window, and overhead. Helps you understand exactly where your GPU memory is going. - VRAM Warnings: Proactive alerts when your GPU is approaching VRAM limits, with recommendations for model sizes and context window adjustments. - Request Metrics: Tracks every LLM request made by RimSynapse mods — response times, token counts, throughput (tokens/second), and queue depth. Identifies bottlenecks in your AI pipeline. - In-Game Overlay HUD: A toggleable on-screen overlay that displays GPU stats, request queue status, and active model information without opening any menus. - Developer Tools Window: A comprehensive debug window with tabs for GPU stats, request history, VRAM analysis, and configuration. Essential for mod developers building on RimSynapse.
--- Toolbar Integration --- - Quick Toggle: A toolbar button lets you instantly toggle the GPU overlay and open the developer tools window.
--- Default Settings (adjustable in-game) --- Overlay Enabled: false (Toggle the on-screen GPU HUD) nvidia-smi Poll Interval: 2000ms (How often GPU stats are refreshed) Request History Length: 100 (Number of recent LLM requests to keep in the metrics log)
--- Changelog --- v0.4.0 - Updated to support RimSynapse Core v0.4.0 (Multi-provider routing and Image generation).
--- Compatibility Matrix --- - Royalty DLC: Compatible - Ideology DLC: Compatible - Biotech DLC: Compatible - Anomaly DLC: Compatible
--- Requirements --- - RimSynapse Core (Must be loaded before this mod) - An NVIDIA GPU with nvidia-smi available on PATH (automatically detected).
--- Note --- This tool is optional and purely diagnostic. It does not affect gameplay. It is intended for users who want to monitor their hardware while running local LLMs alongside RimWorld.
--- Support the Project --- Buy me a coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/archdukejim
